relations.note: Accent-letter tint applies on top of the base campaign headline typographic treatment.
The verbatim lockup copy is rendered using the campaign headline typographic treatment.

quotes: Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold)
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.
Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold)
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.

rules.intent: Preserve the signature campaign headline typographic treatment.
rules.rule_text: The "YOU DESERVE MORE" campaign headline is set in Agenda (campaign_headline.font = Agenda); digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only, with an email fallback of Nunito Sans ExtraBold. It is ALL CAPS, always (campaign_headline.case = all_caps). In hero placements it stacks as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE), left-aligned (campaign_headline.alignment = left).

quotes: set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color
The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.
Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue** (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).

rules.intent: Encode the dermatomyositis accent-letter device and approved colorways.
rules.rule_text: The letters "D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint (tint.campaign_headline.accent_letters_40 = 40%) of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis. Two approved colorways: brand Gold/Sunshine or Brand Blue (#00529b), with the tinted letters at 40% of the same hue.

effect.content: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: **YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.
